note: Public, reference-safe companion skill sources. An entry is auto-clonable by `skills bootstrap --apply` ONLY when provenance_status == 'verified', install_mode == 'clone', and upstream_url is a public https URL. Entries with an empty or unverified upstream_url are never cloned — the user fills in and verifies the real upstream first. The operator's full local/private collection lives only in the gitignored skills.sources.local.json (see skills.sources.local.example.json).

fields.type: gstack | claude-skill-pack | command-pack | docs-pack | local-overlay | unknown

sources.name: GStack
sources.notes: The default operating layer. Confirm the official upstream and license before any bootstrap; this kit never copies its bodies.

sources.name: superpowers-skills (operator-referenced)
sources.notes: Referenced in the operator's own config under the shorthand obra/superpowers-skills. Verify the official upstream URL and license before bootstrap. Reference-only; never copy bodies into this kit.

sources.name: scientific-agent-skills (operator-referenced)
sources.notes: Referenced in the operator's config under the shorthand K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills (installed via npx skills add). Verify the official upstream URL and license before bootstrap.
